title: Erasmus Mundus WOP-P Scholarship 2026/28
description:
The Erasmus Mundus WOP-P program focuses on:

Work and organizational psychology
Personnel and human resource development
Workplace behavior and performance
Leadership, teamwork, and organizational change
Students will study at different partner universities across Europe, gaining a truly international academic experience.
full_description: The Applications are now open for the Erasmus Mundus WOP-P Scholarship 2026/28. This is a prestigious joint Master’s degree funded by the **European Union**, allowing students to study in multiple European countries. It is a **Fully Funded 2 Year Master’s** Degree Program in the Work, Organizational, and Personnel Psychology (WOP-P). Applicants from all around the world are eligible to apply. There is **no application fee,** and **no IELTS** Test is required. This Course is Jointly Prepared by the **4 EU Universities** Located in **Italy**, **Spain**, and **Portugal**. Below you will find the details about the Erasmus Mundus WOP-P Structure, benefits, requirements, and the application Process.
